incident_details.short_description: Contact form web resource fails when Dealer Code is blank
incident_details.description: Users report a JavaScript error when opening the Contact Main form for records where the Dealer Code lookup has not been populated. The embedded dealer summary web resource remains blank.

resolution.root_cause: The form JavaScript assumed the Dealer Code lookup always had a value and attempted to read the first lookup item without a null/length check.
resolution_steps: Reproduced the issue on a Contact record where Dealer Code was empty.
Updated the form script to use executionContext.getFormContext() and retrieve the lookup with formContext.getAttribute('new_dealercode').getValue().
Added a null and array-length guard before reading lookup id/name values.
Changed the web resource iframe source only when a valid Dealer Code lookup exists.
Published the Contact form and verified records with and without Dealer Code load without script errors.

source_inspiration.title: Dynamics 365 JavaScript access to form field values
Model-driven app Client API columns reference
